name: Dr. Hai Lin
title: Doctor of Physical Therapy
bio: Blending rehab and performance so you can move better, feel stronger, and get back to what you love.
bioEs: Combinando rehabilitación y rendimiento para que te muevas mejor, te sientas más fuerte y vuelvas a hacer lo que amas.
longBio:
Hi, I'm Hai. I'm a Doctor of Physical Therapy, born and raised in New York City. I earned both my undergraduate and graduate degrees up in Ithaca, where I completed a Bachelor's in Clinical Health Studies and later my Doctorate in Physical Therapy. During my clinical rotations, I worked everywhere from Mount Sinai's spinal cord unit to sports orthopedic clinics — experiences that taught me that great physical therapy always comes back to two things: movement and genuine connection.

When I work with someone, my goal is to bridge the gap between pain and performance by really understanding who they are, what they can do right now, and what they want to achieve. I don't believe in a one-size-fits-all approach. Instead, I look for the hardest thing you're able to do well and use that as a bridge toward your functional goals.

I'm a big believer in exercise and movement as the most empowering and sustainable ways to create lasting change. Because of that, I've spent most of my continuing education learning from some of the best strength and performance coaches in the world. When I'm not in the clinic, you'll probably find me with a self-help book, riding a CitiBike through the city, or playing pickup basketball somewhere in NYC.
longBioEs: Hola, soy Hai. Soy Doctor en Terapia Física, nacido y criado en la ciudad de Nueva York. Obtuve mi licenciatura y mi doctorado en Ithaca, donde completé una Licenciatura en Estudios de Salud Clínica y luego mi Doctorado en Terapia Física.

name: Coach Wei
title: Certified Personal Trainer
bio: Helping beginners feel confident, capable, and supported every step of their fitness journey.
bioEs: Ayudando a principiantes a sentirse seguros, capaces y apoyados en cada paso de su viaje fitness.
longBio:
Hey, I'm Wei. I grew up in Brooklyn, and I'm a certified personal trainer who loves helping people build strength, lose weight, and develop fitness habits that actually last. I focus on creating personalized programs that feel enjoyable, manageable, and effective — not overwhelming.

I work a lot with beginners and people returning to fitness, and I take pride in being patient and educational. I want you to understand what you're doing, why it works, and how it helps you feel more confident in your body. Every program I build is customized to your goals, your comfort level, and your lifestyle.

My coaching style is friendly, supportive, and straightforward. I'm here to help you stay consistent, push yourself in a healthy way, and feel genuinely good about the progress you make.
longBioEs: Hey, soy Wei. Crecí en Brooklyn y soy entrenador personal certificado al que le encanta ayudar a las personas a construir fuerza, perder peso y desarrollar hábitos fitness que realmente duran.

name: Coach Kate
title: Certified Personal Trainer
bio: Specializing in strength training, mobility, and client-centered coaching.
bioEs: Especializada en entrenamiento de fuerza, movilidad y coaching centrado en el cliente.
longBio:
Hi! I'm Kate — a strength and mobility coach who believes fitness should make you feel strong, capable, and confident in your everyday life.

I grew up in the Czech Republic, where I first fell in love with resistance training and sports. That passion led me to earn my first certification at the Vital Institute in Prague. After years of training clients, I moved to New York City to push myself further and completed the intensive program at the Focus Personal Training Institute.

What you'll notice about my coaching style is that I'm encouraging, positive, and very client-focused. I love designing personalized programs that meet people exactly where they are and help them build real, lasting strength and consistency. My goal is always to help you move better, feel better, and trust what your body can do.
longBioEs: ¡Hola! Soy Kate — una entrenadora de fuerza y movilidad que cree que el fitness debe hacerte sentir fuerte, capaz y segura en tu vida diaria.

name: Coach Jamie
title: Certified Personal Trainer
bio: Helping you build strength, confidence, and long-lasting fitness habits through science-backed training.
bioEs: Ayudándote a construir fuerza, confianza y hábitos fitness duraderos a través de entrenamiento respaldado por la ciencia.
longBio: Coach Jamie takes a science-backed approach to fitness, combining the latest exercise physiology research with practical programming. He focuses on building sustainable habits that last a lifetime, not quick fixes. His clients consistently achieve lasting transformations through progressive, evidence-based training.
longBioEs: El Coach Jamie adopta un enfoque científico del fitness, combinando la última investigación en fisiología del ejercicio con programación práctica.

name: Coach Phillip
title: Certified Personal Trainer
bio: Bringing the mindset of a fighter and the precision of a coach to every training session.
bioEs: Traiendo la mentalidad de un luchador y la precisión de un entrenador a cada sesión.
longBio: Coach Phillip brings an unmatched intensity to every session. With a background in combat sports, he combines the discipline and mental toughness of a fighter with precise coaching methodology. Whether you're training for boxing, looking to build explosive power, or need someone to push you to your limits, Phillip delivers.
longBioEs: El Coach Phillip lleva una intensidad incomparable a cada sesión. Con experiencia en deportes de combate.

name: Coach Abby
title: Certified Personal Trainer
bio: Blending strength, functional movement, and mobility to help you train smarter and feel your strongest.
bioEs: Combinando fuerza, movimiento funcional y movilidad para ayudarte a entrenar más inteligente y sentirte más fuerte.
longBio: Coach Abby believes that true fitness is about more than just lifting heavy. Her holistic approach blends strength training with functional movement patterns and mobility work, creating well-rounded athletes who move well and feel great. She's particularly skilled at helping clients overcome plateaus and prevent injuries.
longBioEs: La Coach Abby cree que el verdadero fitness es más que solo levantar pesado.
